パッケージ nodagumi.ananPJ.Scenario

クラス DumpEvent

  • java.lang.Object
    • nodagumi.ananPJ.Scenario.EventBase
      • nodagumi.ananPJ.Scenario.DumpEvent
  • public class DumpEvent
extends EventBase
    This event cause to interrupt simulation and make a log dump. 
      { "type" : "Dump" 
    "atTime" : __Time__,
    "format" : "GenerationFile",
    "filename" : __FileName__}

  __Time__ ::= "hh:mm:ss"

      • unoccur

        public boolean unoccur​(SimTime currentTime,
